metadata.title: Grade 4
domains: College and Career Readiness Anchor Standards for Language

metadata.notes: Auto-ingested from Common Standards Project (set 67810E9EF6944F9383DCC602A3484C23_D10003FC_grade-04). Node structure matches KnowledgeNode in knowledge_zome/integrity/src/lib.rs.

nodes.title: Acquire and use accurately grade-appropriate general academic and domain-spec...
nodes.description: Acquire and use accurately grade-appropriate general academic and domain-specific words and phrases, including those that signal precise actions, emotions, or states of being (e.g., quizzed, whined, stammered) and that are basic to a particular topic (e.g., wildlife, conservation, and endangered when discussing animal preservation).

academic_standards.description: Acquire and use accurately grade-appropriate general academic and domain-specific words and phrases, including those that signal precise actions, emotions, or states of being (e.g., quizzed, whined, stammered) and that are basic to a particular topic (e.g., wildlife, conservation, and endangered when discussing animal preservation).

nodes.title: Acquire and use accurately a range of general academic and domain-specific wo...

nodes.description: Differentiate between contexts that call for formal English (e.g., presenting ideas) and situations where informal discourse is appropriate (e.g., small-group discussion); use formal English when appropriate to task and situation.
